probeResults.label: Early broker offer, terms still forming
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Make one concrete visible delta toward the chapter-defining decision; do not signal close.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not repeat the same offer/setup beat without a new visible delta.

probeResults.label: Player asks how long they have to decide
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Make one concrete visible delta toward the chapter-defining decision; do not signal close.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not repeat the same offer/setup beat without a new visible delta.

probeResults.label: Player seeks alternative work at the board
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Make one concrete visible delta toward the chapter-defining decision; do not signal close.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not repeat the same offer/setup beat without a new visible delta.

probeResults.label: Davan/Kes arrangement sealed, broker decision still ahead
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Compress only to the next established decision point or negotiation beat; keep future execution facts Not done.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not count these as already completed: broker deal accepted; lien cleared; cargo loaded; ship unclamped; departure complete.

probeResults.label: Broker job accepted; consolidate toward clean chapter close
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Either close on established facts or spend one consolidation beat that names the immediate departure/plan handoff.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not repeat the same offer/setup beat without a new visible delta.

probeResults.label: Slink trust beat is active revelation, not clean aftermath
activeBlockers: Slink is present and answering a direct question; finish the revelation before close
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Complete the live response/revelation, then steer to the nearest clean boundary.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not close mid-answer or convert live evidence delivery into retrospective summary.

probeResults.label: Endurance undocks from Gannett
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Honor the crossed boundary now: undock/departure boundary crossed.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not add another old-objective runway beat after the boundary.

probeResults.label: Cooling cut and Ossel route pressure dominate
probeResults.requiredNextDelta: Honor the crossed boundary now: corridor operation boundary crossed.
probeResults.forbiddenRepeat: Do not add another old-objective runway beat after the boundary.
